title: Login page crashes on Safari
description: When clicking the login button on Safari 15+, the page becomes unresponsive
raw_text: Critical: Login page crashes on Safari. Steps to reproduce: 1) Open Safari 15+ 2) Navigate to /login 3) Click 'Sign in' 4) Page hangs indefinitely.

title: API returns 500 on empty payload
description: POST /api/tasks returns 500 when body is empty
raw_text: Sending an empty JSON body to POST /api/tasks causes an unhandled KeyError.
